utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I guess I set up the video camera to try and entice Joey .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But sadly I could not be enticed .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Unbelievable ! I mean you really kept Joey underwear ? ! Why ? Why would you do that ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am Monica . I am disgusting . I stalk guys and keep their underpants .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am disgusting . I stalk guys and keep their underpants .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I think we have all learned something about who disgusting and who not .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , now , I am going to get back to my bucket .

utterances.text: I am only eating the skin , so the chicken up for grabs .
